entries.note: V62-A reuses the shipped V61 communication surfaces by default.
V62-A is limited to the exact connector snapshot create/get seam only.
V62-A selects only the external_assistant connector principal and keeps human_via_connector deferred.
V62-A requires explicit snapshot, exposure, and freshness basis for connector admission and fails closed if any of them drift.
V62-A keeps the ingress bridge dependent on shipped V61-A ingress/descriptor/interpretation only, without selecting V61-B bridge-office or rewitness as live ingress basis.
V62-A keeps the selected connector path path-level and non-generalizing by default.
